name: Foreign Currency Loan Agreement
description: A loan agreement where the principal amount is disbursed and must be repaid in a specified foreign currency to mitigate exchange rate risks.
content:
FOREIGN CURRENCY LOAN AGREEMENT

LENDER: {{lender_name}} (ID/SSN: {{lender_id}})
BORROWER: {{borrower_name}} (ID/SSN: {{borrower_id}})

1. THE LOAN: For value received, the Lender has loaned to the Borrower, and the Borrower acknowledges receipt of, the principal sum of {{loan_amount}} {{currency_code}} on {{formatDate loan_date}}.

2. REPAYMENT TERMS: The Borrower promises to repay the full principal amount to the Lender on or before {{formatDate maturity_date}}. The repayment shall be made in the exact currency borrowed ({{currency_code}}). If repayment is made in local currency, it must be calculated using the official central bank exchange rate effective on the actual date of payment.

3. SPECIAL CONDITIONS & INTEREST:

{{special_conditions}}

LENDER


Signature: ________________

BORROWER


Signature: ________________

Date Signed: {{formatDate signature_date}}

fields.name: special_conditions
fields.label: Special Conditions / Interest Rate
fields.placeholder: e.g., 5% annual interest. Late payment incurs a 2% penalty.
